---
title: "Gertrude Louisa Charlotte Halliday"
---

## Gertrude Louisa Charlotte Halliday

**Dates:** (b. 1876)

### Description

daughter of Louisa (Walter) Halliday

### Biography

She married (1901) Harry Lamont Manley, and she proved General Halliday’s will.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
